title: Dear Satyajit
overview: Dear Satyajit follows the heartfelt journey of a Bengali filmmaker who spent his life chasing the artistic spirit of his idol, Satyajit Ray. Through memories, dreams, and reflections, the film offers a moving tribute to Ray, honoring his enduring legacy on the occasion of his Birth Centenary.
